title: Website Design Company in Pune: 7 Checks | Growthik
description: Hiring a website design company in Pune? Use these 7 checks to compare portfolio quality, SEO basics, pricing, process and support.

faqs.question: 1. Portfolio: Have They Built Real Pune Business Websites?
faqs.answer: A portfolio is your greatest window into a company's capabilities. Visit the actual live websites. Check how fast they load (use Google PageSpeed Insights), look at mobile responsiveness and notice the quality of copywriting and UI design.

faqs.question: What is the first step in choosing a website design company in Pune?
faqs.answer: The first step is to review their live portfolio. Don't just look at screenshots; visit the actual websites they've built to check for loading speed, mobile responsiveness and user experience.

faqs.question: Why are third-party reviews important when hiring an agency?
faqs.answer: Third-party reviews on Google, Clutch, or LinkedIn are harder to fake than website testimonials and provide genuine insights into the agency's reliability, communication and project delivery.

faqs.question: Should a web design company also know SEO?
faqs.answer: Absolutely. A beautiful website is useless if search engines can't crawl it. Your design company must understand Core Web Vitals, semantic HTML and on-page SEO best practices.

faqs.question: What is a realistic timeline for a custom business website?
faqs.answer: A quality, custom business website typically takes 3 to 6 weeks to design, develop and test. Extremely short timelines (like 5 days) often indicate reliance on generic, unoptimized templates.

faqs.question: What questions should I ask a web designer before hiring?
faqs.answer: Ask about their process, what platform they use (e.g., Next.js, WordPress), how they handle SEO, what their post-launch support looks like and if they provide a detailed, itemized quote.

faqs.question: Why is process and communication critical in web design?
faqs.answer: A defined process ensures the project stays on track and within budget. Poor communication during the sales phase is a massive red flag indicating how the rest of the project will be managed.

faqs.question: What hidden costs should I look out for in web design?
faqs.answer: Be aware of ongoing costs like domain renewals, premium hosting, SSL certificates, premium plugin licenses and monthly maintenance or retainer fees.

faqs.question: Is it better to use a freelancer or a web design agency?
faqs.answer: Agencies generally offer a broader range of specialized skills (design, development, SEO, copywriting) and better reliability, while freelancers might be cheaper but limited in scope and availability.

faqs.question: Why does the technology stack matter for my website?
faqs.answer: The tech stack (e.g., using React/Next.js vs. basic WordPress) determines your website's speed, security, scalability and how easily it can be integrated with other marketing tools.

faqs.question: Should the agency provide content writing services?
faqs.answer: The best agencies offer content writing or at least structural copywriting, because design and content must work together to create a high-converting user experience.

faqs.question: What makes Growthik Media different as a web design company?
faqs.answer: Growthik Media focuses on 'Growth Engineering' - building technically superior, highly optimized websites designed specifically to rank on Google and convert visitors into leads.

faqs.question: What happens after the website is launched?
faqs.answer: A professional agency will offer post-launch support, including security updates, performance monitoring, backup management and ongoing SEO optimization.

sections.heading: 1. Portfolio: Have They Built Real Pune Business Websites?
sections.content: Choosing the wrong website design company in Pune can cost you tens of thousands of rupees and months of productivity. Here are 7 checks to compare web design agencies on portfolio, SEO setup, speed, support and lead-generation thinking before you sign any contract.1. Portfolio: Have They Built Real Pune Business Websites?A portfolio is your greatest window into a company's capabilities. Visit the actual live websites. Check how fast they load (use Google PageSpeed Insights), look at mobile responsiveness and notice the quality of copywriting and UI design.2. Reviews & Client TestimonialsThird-party reviews on Google Maps, Clutch.co, or LinkedIn are more reliable than testimonials on the company's own website. Look for patterns - are clients happy with their communication? Did they deliver on time?3. Their SEO KnowledgeA beautiful website that nobody finds is worthless. Ask every Pune web design agency directly: 'What SEO practices do you include in every website you build?'They should know Core Web Vitals (LCP, CLS, FID/INP)They should implement schema markup as standardAsk about their average PageSpeed score4. Process & CommunicationLook for agencies with a defined process: discovery call → proposal → design mockups → feedback rounds → development → testing → launch.The best indicator of a future project experience is the quality of communication during the sales process. If they're slow to respond now, they'll be worse once you've signed.5. Timeline & Realistic ExpectationsAny reputable agency will tell you that a quality website takes at minimum 3–6 weeks for a business site. If someone promises a complete custom website in 5 days, that's a red flag.6. Post-Launch SupportAsk about their maintenance packages. A good agency sees the relationship as long-term, not transactional.7. Pricing TransparencyDemand a detailed breakdown: design cost, development hours, content migration, SEO setup, hosting setup and monthly maintenance costs.
